topic: A barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Setup (0-2s): Side view; hands place cezve into hot sand in a shallow tray.
Scene 2 — Brewing (2-5s): Macro close-up; sand surrounds cezve; foam forms as water heats; a wooden stirrer gently rotates inside cezve.
Scene 3 — Pour (5-8s): Top-down tilt; the cezve is lifted from sand and pours dark brew into a small cup; steam wisps rise.
parsed_generation.narration: Hot sand provides even, gentle heat that prevents scorching and preserves the coffee's delicate oils. The cezve brews slowly, building a foamy crest as flavors mingle. The pour into a tiny cup delivers a rich aroma and lingering spice, a ritual rooted in tradition.

feedback: The output adheres to a clear three-scene structure and stays centered on the cezve-in-sand brewing. To improve, tighten the Turkish-coffee specificity (grind size, foam characteristics) and reduce narration repetition of on-screen actions. Consider naming a barista or human action to reinforce the topic and ensure every cue ties directly to Turkish coffee traditions.
strengths: Explicit hot-sand use and cezve interaction
fixes: Include explicit Turkish coffee details (fine grind, traditional foam/crema cues) to strengthen topic precision
Add a clear human element (the barista or hands) performing actions to reinforce the topic and avoid ambiguity
